## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content audit progress, performance metrics, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content audit (image, SEO, link) in progress; image audit complete, SEO/link ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Website performance dipped slightly but remains strong; LLS traffic at all-time highs](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [New team member (Jackson) joining Galileo next week; potential extended call for onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Audit completion expected next week; full content publishing to resume thereafter](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

## Topics

### Weekend Recap

  - [Conor had a relaxing long weekend at home after recent travel](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Vivek's parents visiting; Lisbon hosting month-long sardine festival](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)

### Content Audit Progress

  - [Image audit completed](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [SEO audit ongoing; titles and meta descriptions being checked](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Link audit taking longer due to manual verification process](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [New article creation slightly delayed (5 delivered last week vs. 7-8 usual)](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Figma access needed for template editing; Conor to coordinate with designer](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

### Website Performance

  - [Slight dip in overall performance, but better than expected given recent changes](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [New website layout and design praised for improved appearance](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [LLS traffic at all-time highs](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Unusual drop in GSC impressions, possibly due to reduced visibility in AI Overview results](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [SEMrush data lagging; full analysis expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### Upcoming Tasks

  - [Continue audit process; aim to finish next week](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

  - [Content review process to ramp up, likely starting second week of June](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Full content publishing to resume after audit completion](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)

### Team Coordination

  - [Three Galileo team members on vacation this week](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Conor to review topics in coming days](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Vivek to follow up on Figma access requirements via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/_4kAEZGw-vJPyCEFC_kxNXnpWEMrhfVd?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
